steps.title: Identify the limitations
steps.content: The passage says heliographs worked largely only during daytime and depended on air opacity and line of sight. The replacement technology should solve those environmental constraints.

steps.title: Match the replacement
steps.content: Choice A addresses production and maintenance, Choice C addresses possible uses, and Choice D addresses Morse code. Those are not the stated reasons heliographs were limited. A technology less constrained by environmental circumstances follows logically from the passage. The answer is B.
